package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for byte_string_conversion_in_loop: Byte-to-string or string-to-byte conversion observed inside loops in short-lived lookup or append paths.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario346Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
